content.text:
{
  "dimension": "coaching-stance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates strong VIEW throughout. Wonder is genuine and focused on the actual phenomenon — the 'slight evenness,' the pause before 'surprised,' the 'isn't it?,' the word 'functional.' The coach does not insist something is wrong (turn 8 explicitly honors 'Comfort and ease are real things') yet also does not take 'we're fine' at face value. Impartiality is present — there's no agenda to push the client into a diagnosis; questions are offered and then silence is held (notice the absence of stacked questions; each turn is one clean question). Empathy is felt rather than performed — no validation noises, no 'thank you for sharing.' Pace consistently slows when the client speeds up or deflects (turns 10, 12, 14 each catch a micro-movement rather than chasing the client's narrative). Vulnerability is the weakest leg — the coach doesn't name their own state in first person — but the overall stance is so clearly undefended and curious that 3 still fits better than 2. The coach is tracking the body and the language, not running a script.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with wonder about a specific noticed quality ('slight evenness') rather than a generic probe. One question, no stacking."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Checks the client's felt sense impartially — offers both options ('true, or a little flat') without steering."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Genuine curiosity about the quality of presence; holds space without insisting on a problem."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicitly honors what the client said is real ('Comfort and ease are real things') — undefended, no need to be right — then opens a new aperture."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tracks the body/pause rather than the content. Wonder about the actual phenomenon in front of them."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses the authority position the client offers ('you're asking me') — impartiality and non-attachment to outcome."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Lets the client lead the noticing ('You noticed it before I could say anything') — does not need to be the one who finds the insight."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["what-are-you-defending", "the-happiness-filter", "lets-go-there"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["meet-resistance-with-okay"],
  "notes": "Coach could have named their own state once (vulnerability leg is implicit rather than explicit), but the overall stance is clearly in VIEW, not performing technique."
}
